case_title: ANA ALEMAN et al VS. WILLIAM ZIMMERMAN et al

docket_entries.description: ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR APR-05-2011 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-11-2011 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE MAY-27-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALEMAN, ANA VALENDEZ, JULIO AS TO DEFENDANT ZIMMERMAN, WILLIAM DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAY-27-2011 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-22-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAY-12-2011
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PROOF OF SERVICE ON APR-05-2011 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-11-2011 IS OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
